gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/63)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/63)
text: قُلْتُ لَهُ فِي الْجَوَامِيسِ شَيْ‏ءٌ قَالَ مِثْلُ مَا فِي الْبَقَرِ .

en.hubeali: (It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup>, said, ‘I said to him<sup>asws</sup>, ‘is there anything upon the buffaloes?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Similar to what is regarding the cows’.
en.sarwar: 2. It is narrated from Zurarah who has said the following: “I once asked abu Ja‘far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about buffalos if there is Zakat for it. He (the Imam) said, ‘It is like cows.’”
